title: EXPOSED: Meta stole Quantum Bridge from Open Source Projects
body:

## The Evidence

Documents obtained from encrypted servers show:

- Internal emails confirming knowledge of the source
- Internal emails confirming knowledge of the source

## The Impact

This theft has enabled Meta to:

- Claim originality for copied work
- Prevent original creators from competing
